## Checklist

- [ ] This PR has one primary purpose and no unrelated changes.
- [ ] Verification commands above were actually run and their output is pasted, not summarized.
- [ ] Tests and docs were updated for behavior changes, or their absence is explained.
- [ ] No secrets, credential material, or debug artifacts were introduced.
- [ ] Protected Areas (production config, secrets, auth, payments, CI/CD, migrations) were not touched, or the change was explicitly reviewed and approved for that area.
